# Q2 2026 Quarterly Targets and Compensation

## Team Quota: $2.4M

The team quota represents combined new ARR and expansion revenue for Q2 2026 (April 1 — June 30). Quota was set by VP Sales Jennifer Torres in collaboration with CFO Mark Davidson and CEO Laura Chen during the annual planning process.

## Compensation Structure

### Base + Variable Split
- Enterprise AEs: 50/50 split (base $90K, OTE $180K)
- Mid-Market AEs: 60/40 split (base $72K, OTE $120K)
- SDRs: 70/30 split (base $52.5K, OTE $75K)

### Commission Rates
- Enterprise: 10% of ARR on new deals, 5% on expansion/renewal
- Mid-Market: 12% of ARR on new deals, 6% on expansion/renewal
- SDRs: $250 per qualified meeting that converts to opportunity, $500 bonus per closed-won deal they sourced

### Accelerators
- **100-110% of quota**: 1x commission rate (standard)
- **110-130% of quota**: 1.5x commission rate on incremental ARR above 110%
- **130%+ of quota**: 2x commission rate on incremental ARR above 130% (President's Club qualifier)

### President's Club
Top performer in each segment (Enterprise and Mid-Market) qualifies for President's Club — an all-expenses-paid trip to Cabo San Lucas in January 2027. Aisha Patel won in 2025 (Maui trip). Rachel Nguyen won in 2024 (Cancun trip).

## Q2 Focus Areas (from Jennifer Torres)

1. Enterprise team: prioritize expansion revenue from existing accounts — 40% of quota should come from upsells
2. Mid-Market team: increase average deal size from $55K to $65K by positioning Professional+ bundles
3. SDRs: shift outbound focus to financial services and healthcare verticals (highest conversion rates in Q1 data)
